CustomField.description: If the State in the City and State field is not "CA" or "California" then return "twenty-four (24)" for contract language, otherwise "twelve (12)" for CA. Used in PandaDoc
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(City_State__c) || NOT(CONTAINS(City_State__c, ",")), "", CASE( UPPER( TRIM( MID( City_State__c, FIND(",", City_State__c) + 1, LEN(City_State__c) ) ) ), "CA", "twelve (12)", "CALIFORNIA", "twelve (12)", "twenty-four (24)" ) )
CustomField.label: Covenant Duration Contract Language
